title: Collapsed-by-default tool display with Ctrl+O expand
description:
Overhaul tool result display in message_list.rs. Default: collapsed (just checkmark/X). Ctrl+O toggles expand/collapse on focused entry. Specifics:
- Read: just checkmark (filename already in parens header)
- Bash: just checkmark/X, no output unless expanded
- Search: checkmark + count or 'No matches'
- Edit/Write: checkmark + inline diff with line numbers and colored +/- (always shown)
- Add expanded/collapsed state to MessageEntry
- Ctrl+O keybinding in event handler
Key files: src/tui/message_list.rs (format_result_content, ResultStyle), src/tui/events.rs, src/tui/session/update.rs

logs.msg: Implemented collapsed-by-default tool display. ToolMeta stores header/tool_name/raw_result/is_error on non-grouped entries. format_result_content takes expanded:bool. Ctrl+O toggles all entries via needs_reflow. Session replay stores ToolMeta identically. Review cleaned up: moved result into ToolMeta to avoid clone, removed dead load_from_messages, fixed singular grammar. 11 new tests.
